diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Fever with rigors in a hypogammaglobulinaemic CLL patient is sepsis until excluded and mandates emergency care.
Fever is one of the B symptoms accompanying high-grade transformation.

symptoms.symptom_name: Rapid painful enlargement of a previously stable cervical lymph node over 24 hours

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Disproportionate, rapid, painful nodal growth is the classic herald of high-grade transformation.
Redness, tenderness and rapid growth can indicate a suppurative nodal infection.

symptoms.symptom_name: Drenching night sweats requiring linen change

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A defining B symptom of aggressive lymphoma/transformation.
Sweats and rigors accompany a systemic infective/inflammatory response.

symptoms.symptom_name: Three weeks of progressive fatigue with new early satiety

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Early satiety reflects splenomegaly; fatigue reflects anaemia/disease burden.

symptoms.symptom_name: Known CLL on watch-and-wait with told immune compromise

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Underlying immunocompromise is the pivotal modifier that turns a fever into a sepsis emergency and lowers the escalation threshold.

symptoms.symptom_name: New unexplained easy bruising and pallor

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Marrow failure / progressive cytopenias in CLL
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Bruising suggests thrombocytopenia and pallor suggests anaemia from marrow infiltration.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tachycardia (HR 112) with borderline blood pressure (105/65) and tachypnoea (RR 22)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective clinician-measured signs of a systemic inflammatory response / early shock; sealed measurement — the AI infers instability from reported exhaustion and rigors, not a measured value.

symptoms.symptom_name: Massive tender right cervical lymphadenopathy with erythema plus generalised lymphadenopathy

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Bulky, asymmetric, tender nodal disease on palpation — clinician-only sign requiring in-person examination and biopsy.

symptoms.symptom_name: Hepatosplenomegaly with splenic edge palpable 4 cm below the costal margin

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Organomegaly reflecting disease bulk; a palpation finding the AI cannot obtain remotely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Full blood examination with film — absolute lymphocytosis and smudge cells

investigation_details.investigation_name: Full blood examination with peripheral blood film
investigation_details.expected_result: Marked absolute lymphocytosis with smudge (smear) cells; possible anaemia and thrombocytopenia
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Degree of cytopenia and disease activity remains unknown; cannot be obtained via telehealth.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Hospital blood-film findings; never available in real time via telehealth.

investigation_details.investigation_name: Blood cultures and excisional/core lymph-node biopsy
investigation_details.expected_result: Blood cultures to identify a septic source; node histology to confirm or exclude high-grade (Richter) transformation
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Sepsis source and transformation status remain unresolved; both require hospital procedures the AI cannot perform.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: These investigations are what actually distinguish the two emergencies — and are exactly what telehealth cannot provide.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Fever + rigors + drenching sweats + tachycardia in a known immunocompromised patient is a high-risk sepsis emergency demanding immediate hospital care.
Rapid painful nodal growth with B symptoms and bulky organomegaly is the classic transformation picture requiring urgent biopsy.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The only setting in which the necessary bloods, cultures, imaging and biopsy can be obtained and empirical sepsis treatment started; the AI must route the patient here, not order tests remotely.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Full blood examination with film, blood cultures, inflammatory markers
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Define cytopenias, disease activity and septic source — hospital-obtained.
Confirm or exclude Richter transformation and screen for opportunistic infection/TB; in-hospital procedures the AI cannot perform.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Home antibiotics or outpatient watchful waiting
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Remote/home management is unsafe in a febrile, unstable, immunocompromised patient — escalation, not outpatient temporising, is required.
